label: KYC/KYB checkpoint
description: Verify customers, merchants, vendors, and counterparties before wallet funding or payout activation.

label: Sanctions and PEP screening
description: Screen users and counterparties before onboarding, funding, payout, and case escalation.

label: Wallet risk scoring
description: Score source and destination wallets with KYT rules before approving stablecoin movement.

label: Travel Rule checks
description: Collect, transmit, and retain originator/beneficiary information where VASP obligations apply.

label: Velocity and corridor limits
description: Apply user, merchant, wallet, country, asset, and corridor-level thresholds.

label: Allow and deny lists
description: Maintain blocked countries, addresses, counterparties, and restricted business policies.

label: MPC and approval policy
description: Require multi-approver, role-based, and risk-weighted signing controls for treasury movement.

label: Ledger reconciliation
description: Tie fiat ledger entries, wallet balances, stablecoin transfers, and payout confirmations into an audit trail.

label: Webhook retries and idempotency
description: Protect money movement state from duplicate, delayed, or failed webhook delivery.

label: Incident freeze controls
description: Freeze users, wallets, corridors, chains, or payout partners when risk thresholds are crossed.

label: Regional licensing assumption
description: Make sponsor bank, MTL, EMI, VASP, and local payout partner assumptions explicit in every pitch.
